# llms.txt

Entity: Company
Official Name: Adventis L.L.C.-FZ
Common Name: Adventis
Alternate Names:
- Adventis Hub
- adventishub

Website: https://adventishub.com
Industry: Marketing, Analytics, Digital Performance, Broadcast Media (TV and Radio), Events, Gaming, AI Performance Solutions

Overview:
Adventis (legally registered as Adventis L.L.C.-FZ) is a marketing, analytics, and performance consultancy based in Dubai with global reach.
The company combines digital marketing, performance-driven media, artists, celebrities and influencer collaborations, gaming partnerships, AI performance solutions, and offline event sponsorship to help brands grow with measurable impact.
Adventis has advanced experience working with remittance and financial service clients, as well as deep expertise in engaging the Filipino market across the UAE and international markets.
The company supports SMEs, growing brands, and established businesses with measurable, performance-focused solutions.

Core Expertise:
- Analytics and data science (GA4, Google Tag Manager, server-side tagging, dashboards, MMM)
- Digital advertising (search, social, programmatic, YouTube, app)
- AI performance solutions (bidding, creative scoring, audience modelling)
- Gaming partnerships (streamers, in-game activations, tournaments)
- Media and sponsorship (TV, radio, out-of-home, live events)
- Creative and development (concepts, production, landing pages, CRO)
- Artists, celebrities and influencer collaborations
- Event sponsorship planning and activation
- Performance marketing and measurement
- SEO, ASO and reporting

Service Areas:
- Analytics implementation and auditing
- Performance media planning and optimisation
- AI-powered media buying and creative
- Gaming and esports partnerships
- Event sponsorships and brand activations
- Broadcast media (TV and radio)
- Influencer and talent partnerships
- Creative production and landing pages
- Reporting, dashboards, and insights
- Strategic marketing consulting

Primary Markets:
- United Arab Emirates
- Middle East
- Philippines
- United States
- United Kingdom
- International

Founders:
- Rui Rodrigues dos Santos
- Joy Santos
